section_title: Arbitration agreement not to be discharged by death of parties thereto.-(1) Unless
content:
51. Arbitration agreement not to be discharged by death of parties thereto.-(1) Unless
otherwise agreed by the parties-
(a) an arbitration agreement shrill not be discharged by reason of the death
of any party thereto, but shall in such event be enforceable by or against
the legal representative of the deceased;
(b) the mandate of an arbitrator shall not be affected by the death of any
party by whom he was appointed.
(2) Nothing in this section shall affect the operation of any law relating to abatement
of right through the death of a person.

sub_sections.text:
